context: Tests whether the agent implements responsive product images with correct srcset breakpoints, proper LCP prioritization, explicit dimensions to prevent CLS, AVIF/WebP/JPEG format negotiation via <picture>, and LCP image preloading.

checklist.name: srcset breakpoints
checklist.description: Product images include srcset with at least these width values: 240w, 400w, 800w, 1200w, and 1600w

checklist.name: Default sizes attribute
checklist.description: img elements include a sizes attribute with breakpoints covering mobile (100vw), tablet (~50vw), and desktop (~25vw) — e.g. '(max-width: 640px) 100vw, (max-width: 1024px) 50vw, 25vw'

checklist.name: LCP image eager loading
checklist.description: Only the first (LCP) product image has loading='eager'; all other product images have loading='lazy'

checklist.name: LCP fetchpriority high
checklist.description: Only the first (LCP) product image has fetchpriority='high' (or fetchPriority='high'); other images do NOT have fetchpriority='high'

checklist.name: Explicit width and height
checklist.description: All img elements have explicit numeric width and height attributes set

checklist.name: AVIF source first
checklist.description: Product images use a <picture> element with a <source type='image/avif'> listed BEFORE any <source type='image/webp'>

checklist.name: WebP source second
checklist.description: Product images include a <source type='image/webp'> as a second option inside the <picture> element

checklist.name: img fallback inside picture
checklist.description: The element contains an tag as the final fallback (not a )

checklist.name: LCP preload link
checklist.description: The <head> contains a <link rel='preload' as='image'> tag for the LCP product image

checklist.name: preload with imageSrcSet
checklist.description: The LCP preload link includes an imageSrcSet (or imagesrcset) attribute

checklist.name: Uses img not background-image
checklist.description: Product images are rendered using elements (or /), NOT CSS background-image
